subject: english
description: what / where / who などの疑問詞を文頭に置いて、具体的な情報を尋ねます。

questions.question: ___ do you play? (何を？)
questions.explanation: 「何を？」は What を使います

questions.question: ___ do you play games? (どこで？)
questions.explanation: 「どこで？」は Where を使います

questions.question: ___ do you play games? (いつ？)
questions.explanation: 「いつ？」は When を使います

questions.question: ___ do you play games? (なぜ？)
questions.explanation: 「なぜ？」は Why を使います

questions.question: ___ do you play games? (どのように？)
questions.explanation: 「どのように？」は How を使います

questions.question: ___ is your name? (誰？)
questions.explanation: 「名前は何？」は What を使います

questions.question: ___ book is this? (誰の？)
questions.explanation: 「誰の？」は Whose を使います
